name: SomeIpProvidedFieldAddConsumer
title: SomeIpProvidedFieldAddConsumer
syntax: long SomeIpProvidedFieldAddConsumer(dword pfHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Adds a consumer to a provided field. Afterwards the field notifications will be sent to this consumer.

parameters.name: pfHandle
parameters.description: Provided field handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle)
